temple.description: Clerics tend the wounded, speeding recovery for all.
temple.assigned_bonus_desc: Tier I: Each Cleric grants +1 HP/day healing. Tier II: Craft Healing Potions. Tier III: Resurrect highest-level fallen on return.
temple.retire_bonus_desc: One resurrection per expedition — a fallen adventurer may be saved.

training_grounds.description: Fighters drill here, improving combat readiness for all parties.
training_grounds.assigned_bonus_desc: Tier I: +1 to-hit per Fighter. Tier II: +1 damage per Fighter. Tier III: Monsters check morale at -2.
training_grounds.retire_bonus_desc: All parties gain +3 attack strength permanently.

library.description: Magic-Users research arcane lore, identifying magical treasures from dungeon junk.
library.assigned_bonus_desc: Tier I: 3% chance per M-U to find magic items. Tier II: Craft Scrolls. Tier III: Craft Artifacts (1000gp, doubles spell uses).
library.retire_bonus_desc: Parties can cast Identify freely — doubles magic item discovery chance.

smithy.description: Dwarves forge weapons and armor, crafting magical equipment for adventurers.
smithy.assigned_bonus_desc: Tier I: Craft Magic Weapon / Craft Magic Armor (one per slot). Tier II: Masterwork chance for +2 or +3 items.
smithy.retire_bonus_desc: Masterwork weapons and armor flow from the forge.
